items.special_treatment: All activity assays (oxidation and reduction) were performed in semi-micro cuvettes with a total volume of 1 mL. The text does not specify any mechanical or magnetic stirring, shaking, or other mixing method for the cuvette-based spectrophotometric assays. There is no mention of vessel geometry, stirrer type, or mixing speed. The only temperature control mentioned is via a temperature-controlled slide in the spectrophotometer and external thermometer. For enzyme incubation (e.g., stability studies), a Thermomixer comfort (Eppendorf) was used, but no shaking or mixing speed is specified.
